# Calendar

Displays a month grid for selecting a single date or a range.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/calendar
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview slug="calendar" example={0} code={`<Calendar mode="single" />`} />

```tsx
<Calendar mode="single" />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="calendar"
  example={1}
  code={`<Calendar mode="range" numberOfMonths={2} />`}
/>

```tsx
<Calendar mode="range" numberOfMonths={2} />
```

## Props

No component-specific props are documented yet. Primitive props pass through to the underlying element or Radix part.

No recipe variants are documented for this component.
